Petition Of Administrator For Authorization To Compromise Claims And For Waiver Of Conflict Of Interest Re Administrator'S Intended Purchase
Off Calendar Oct-17-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Geoffrey Adams appearing for Sylvia Lynch.
Mr Adams informs the court that the consents of the beneficiaries were filed yesterday. The petition is granted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Susan Lee CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
